DoctorProfilePage.whatToExpectStep1Body: Pick a slot and send your request to the professional.
DoctorProfilePage.whatToExpectStep2Body: The professional will check their schedule and approve your visit.
DoctorProfilePage.whatToExpectStep3Body: Once approved, you'll receive an email with your calendar invite and WhatsApp link.

Hero.title:
Stop chasing appointments.
Start protecting your time.
Hero.subtitleLine1: The professional booking link built for Cyprus's independent practices.
Hero.subtitleLine2: Get the benefits of automation without losing the human touch.

Features.heading: Why DocCy?
Features.syncDesc: Google & Apple Calendar integration. See your real-time availability and manage requests from any device.
Features.confirmDesc: Patients request a slot, you confirm with one click. Total control to eliminate scheduling chaos and double-bookings.
Features.profileDesc: A professional interface that filters inquiries and saves you hours of manual WhatsApp back-and-forth.

Showcase.title: See how DocCy puts you back in charge

automatedFollowup.title: Professional automated follow-up
automatedFollowup.body: Once you approve, DocCy does the heavy lifting: confirmation emails, calendar add-ons, and WhatsApp links—no manual busywork.

overlapGuard.title: Chaos blocked before it starts
overlapGuard.body: When a request overlaps your agenda, DocCy warns you instantly. Adjust duration or use your power to suggest alternative times with one click.

breakGuard.title: Your personal time stays protected
breakGuard.body: DocCy flags conflicts with your breaks or off-hours in real time. Automation finally works for you, not against your boundaries.

smartRequestFilter.title: Smart Requests, not blind bookings
smartRequestFilter.body: Each request arrives structured with patient, time, and reason. You decide with full context from one professional command-center.

pendingClarity.title: No confusion, just clear Pending
pendingClarity.body: Patients see their request as 'Pending' until you give the green light. We manage their expectations to prevent unannounced visits.

pendingVisual.title: Pending is visible at a glance
pendingVisual.body: Pending requests stand out in your agenda, clearly separated from confirmed visits. Nothing enters your day without your explicit approval.

proposalEmail.title: You decide, DocCy follows up
proposalEmail.body: Pick your best three available options. DocCy sends a polished email with a clear 24-hour deadline, so the admin work runs itself.

sync.title: Total Sync
sync.body: Everything is added to your Google or iOS Calendar, matching your preferred language and keeping your life in sync.

weeklyGrid.title: Professional Command Center
weeklyGrid.body: Run your entire week from one visual board. Every booking, request, and gap is clear at a glance. Goodbye, paper diary.

premiumStorefront.title: Your Premium Digital Storefront
premiumStorefront.body: For independents, brand is everything—yet many still lack a real site or settle for cluttered directory pages. DocCy is your showroom: a clean, modern public profile with your photo, specialty, and languages patients scan first, especially across Cyprus's tourism and expat mix.

settingsProfile.title: Profile & Visibility Controls
settingsProfile.body: Manage your professional specialty, languages, and profile readiness from one central place.

settingsSchedule.title: Schedule Customization
settingsSchedule.body: Full control of your practice: set your own boundaries, breaks, slot durations, and booking rules.

Pricing.title: Special launch pricing for the first 100 practitioners across Cyprus
Pricing.why90Desc: We want you to test DocCy through a full business quarter, including holidays and seasonal shifts. It gives enough real-world data to judge impact on your practice with confidence.
Pricing.limited: Limited Availability: <spots>{count}</spots> spots remaining out of 100
Pricing.foundersUnavailable: Founders Club offer is no longer available. Standard pricing is now active.
Pricing.noCard: No credit card required to start your free trial. Lifetime €19 pricing is locked in upon signup.
